name: Jack Kroninger
headline: Workday Integrations Consultant
summary: Analyst at Deloitte working in technical Workday integrations. Background in systems thinking, end-to-end builds, and software that has to behave the morning after.

highlights: Design and implement Workday Studio, EIB and Core Connector integrations for large enterprise clients across HCM, payroll, and financials.
Lead technical discovery for incoming client engagements; translate operational requirements into integration architectures.
Maintain a small library of internal templates and tooling that has shortened standard integration delivery times.
Rotated across HR Transformation engagements; contributed to integration design and testing on two Workday deployments.
Built and shipped small contract projects for local businesses; learned the gap between school code and production code.

education.notes: Magna cum laude. Concentration in business analytics.
